name: ejentum-mcp
description: MCP server for the Ejentum Reasoning Harness. Four cognitive tools (reasoning, code, anti-deception, memory) over a library of 679 cognitive operations engineered in two layers: a natural-language procedure plus an executable reasoning topology (graph DAG with gates, parallel branches, and meta-cognitive exits). Injected before an LLM's first token to harden reasoning against decay on complex tasks and long agent loops.
author: Ejentum <info@ejentum.com>
